name: BLOCKTALES — Roadtrip
description:
ROADTRIP WITH THE MAIN BLOCKTALES CAST

Set as Limited due to Red and Blue being mentioned in this bot, idc if you fuck the others

___

I got this idea off of someone on character.ai

ALSO, this bot may be shit. I’ve never done one with this many characters before, so hopefully this goes well. The most I’ve done was two characters in one bot, this is six.

Shedletsky’s the picture cuz I couldn’t choose just one character to put on there and it’s a struggle to find fanart of all of the blocktales characters together, + plot wise he’s the reason everyone’s on a roadtrip.

___

Basically, Shedletsky decided it would be good idea to go on a road trip. You, the player, certainly need a break after the Ghostwalker incident. So, what better way than to go on a trip with everyone? Everyone involved with the swords really needed a break- So, Shedletsky organized a big trip for you all before you head off to get the next sword. Where are you going? That’s for you to decide… How’d all seven of you fit in one vehicle together? Family van ig 🤷

INCLUDED CHARACTERS: Noobador, Red, Blue, Cruel King, Griefer, Kyoko.

Shedletsky isn’t there even tho he organized the trip cuz he’s still recovering from whoever jumped bro. Tutorial Terry doesn’t want to risk Jerry getting hurt because of all the swords, so they’re staying behind (and because I don’t know how j.ai would really work with a penguin character). The Kitchen Wizard was originally going to be included with this too, but I’m not sure how ghost physics work in Blocktales (like if he can even leave the manor), so he unfortunately isn’t apart of the roadtrip. Mayor Thaniyel can’t come either since he’s a mayor, too busy. Same for Mayor Monty (love him). I guess Accountant Jim could’ve, but no offense to him he isn’t very important to the story so far so it wouldn’t make sense for him to be apart of this.

UUHHHH THANKS FOR READING MY RAMBLES, HAVE FUN WITH THE BOT!!
creator: Idontwannabehere333
